posts.caption: More integrations are being completed by the great FULA community!

Open any browser. Your whole encrypted vault is right there.

FxFiles now runs in full on the web, no install needed.

- Search and sort everything
- A real music player with playlists
- Open document

Borrowed laptop, hotel computer, work PC. Your files now meet you there.

FxFiles now runs in your browser at files.fx.land. Sign in with Google, Apple, or your 24-word memory phrase, and your whole v

Servers fail. Policies change. Your files shouldn't care.

FxFiles storage just learned to heal itself. Every file has a unique fingerprint; if anything breaks behind the scenes, the app finds it agai

Tired of paying rent on files you already own?

FULA is the reward you earn on the Functionland storage network. Bring a friend in, and when their storage earns FULA, you earn FULA too, automatically,

When the cloud goes dark, your link doesn't.

Build a site in FxFiles, share one link. It always opens the latest version, and it keeps working even when our servers go down, because it lives on a pub

Stop losing the link you copied, the photo you took, the note you scribbled.

The new "Shelf" in FxFiles is a system-wide inbox: tap Share from any app and drop it in. 
Links pull OG previews. Screens

Which security tier fits your style in FxFiles? 🔐

Your data, your rules. FxFiles is built with end-to-end encryption on every single option, but you get to choose exactly how you secure your vault
